<!--
Keep PRs small and focused. Small PRs review faster and merge faster, which
also happens to be the cleanest path to Pull Shark progress.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / tooling
- [ ] Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] I updated docs where relevant
- [ ] Commits are signed off (and co-authored where pairing)

<!--
Pairing? Add a trailer to your commit message so both authors get credit:

Co-authored-by: Name <email@users.noreply.github.com>
-->
